title: UK/Chile: Exchange of Letters on the Termination of the Agreement for the Promotion and Protection of Investments with Protocol, done at Santiago, 8 January 1996 [TS No.1/2025]
body: "Published title: Exchange of Letters between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Republic of Chile on the Termination of the Agreement between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Republic of Chile for the Promotion and Protection of Investments with Protocol, done at Santiago, 8 January 1996. "
